title: Confidential Transactions
description: Confidential Transactions hide transaction amounts and selected asset information while preserving verifiability through cryptographic commitments and range proofs. Elements and Liquid use this model as a core privacy and asset-transfer feature.

resources.title: Liquid Technical Overview
resources.notes: Official overview of Liquid's confidential transactions and issued-asset model.

resources.title: Elements Repository
resources.notes: Open-source platform implementation and technical documentation.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for cryptographic commitments, transaction validation, and Bitcoin's UTXO model.
